evals.description: Skill bundles a complete deliverables folder with all core files present
evals.prompt: Bundle the presentation for slug: q2-review-2026. All four files are ready in /deliverables/q2-review-2026/.
assertions: The skill runs bundle_manager.py with the correct --slug and --path arguments
index.xlsx is created with a Summary sheet and a Files sheet
manifest.json is created with schema_version, project metadata, and a deliverables array
manifest.json has all_core_files_present: true and an empty warnings array
The skill reports the final bundle contents to the user

evals.description: Skill creates a partial bundle with warnings when a core file is missing
evals.prompt: Bundle slug: annual-review-2026 — but the speaker-notes.docx wasn't generated yet.
assertions: The skill still creates index.xlsx and manifest.json without blocking
manifest.json has all_core_files_present: false
manifest.json has a warnings entry for the missing speaker-notes.docx
The Files sheet in index.xlsx shows speaker-notes.docx with status 'missing'
The skill offers to trigger presentation-speaker-notes to fill the gap

evals.description: Skill includes SHA256 hashes for all present files in the manifest
evals.prompt: Generate the manifest for slug: product-launch-2026 with checksums.
assertions: Each present file entry in manifest.json includes a sha256 field
The sha256 values are non-empty strings (64 hex characters)
Missing files do not have sha256 fields
The manifest is valid JSON

evals.description: Skill surfaces missing openpyxl dependency with install instruction
evals.prompt: Create the bundle for slug: strategy-2026.
assertions: If openpyxl is not installed, the skill provides: pip install openpyxl
The manifest.json is still created even if index.xlsx fails
The skill does not silently skip the xlsx step

evals.description: Skill produces an index.xlsx with exactly two sheets: Summary and Files
evals.prompt: Create the project index for slug: demo-day-2026, author: Jane Smith, title: Demo Day 2026 Presentation.
assertions: index.xlsx has a 'Summary' sheet with Project, Slug, Author, Generated, Total files, Total size (KB) rows
index.xlsx has a 'Files' sheet with columns: File, Type, Size (KB), Created, Status, Notes
The Author field shows 'Jane Smith'
The Generated field is a valid ISO timestamp
All present files appear in the Files sheet with status ✅ Present
